debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
afunc_monotone :
  ∀ (list₁ list₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })),
    list₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc list₁ list₂ ≠ []
head : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp : List.foldl afunc [] tail = [] ↔ ¬∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁
h_is : index₁ = head.2
h_nil : List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) [head] tail = []
⊢ ¬List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) [head] tail = []

proof:
simp [← h_is, ← afuncDef]
                    apply afunc_monotone
                    simp
failed_attempts:
(by
                      have h : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun p x => if head.2 = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) p l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with
                        | nil => intro p hp; simp [hp]
                        | cons x xs IH => intro p hp; simp [List.foldl_cons]; apply IH; split <;> (simp; assumption)
                      exact h tail [head] (by simp))

have h_ne : ∀ l init, init ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) init l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l <;> intros <;> simp <;> split <;> (apply ih <;> simp [*])
                    apply h_ne _ _ (by simp)

have h_f : (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) = afunc := by
                      simp [afuncDef, h_is]; ext; cases x; simp
                    rw [h_f]
                    apply afunc_monotone
                    simp
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone; simp

by
                      have h : ∀ l, l ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l tail ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail
                        case nil => intro l hl; exact hl
                        case cons _ _ ih =>
                          intro l hl; simp [List.foldl]; apply ih
                          split <;> (simp; assumption)
                      apply h; simp

intro l; induction l
                    case nil => simp
                    case cons y ys ih => intros acc ha; simp; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [ha]
                  exact h_ne tail [head] (by simp)
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone; simp
simp
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone; simp

by
                      have h_mon : ∀ l, l ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l tail ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail with
                        | nil => intro l hl; exact hl
                        | cons y ys ih => intro l hl; apply ih; by_cases h : head.2 = y.2 <;> simp [h, hl]
                      exact h_mon [head] (by simp)

have h_f : ∀ l i, i ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) i l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with | nil => simp | cons x xs ih => intro i hi; simp; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [hi]
                      exact h_f tail [head] (by simp)
exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone; simp

by
                      have : (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) = afunc := by
                        funext; simp [h_is, afuncDef]; cases x; simp
                      rw [this]; apply afunc_monotone; simp
by rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)

apply afunc_monotone
                      simp
exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
rw [← h_is]; exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
simp
subst h_is; exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
simp [afuncDef, h_is] at *; exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp))

have h_mem : ∀ l, head ∈ l → head ∈ List.foldl (fun prev x => if head.2 = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l tail := by
                      intro l hl; induction tail generalizing l with
                      | nil => exact hl
                      | cons h' t' ih =>
                        simp; split_ifs
                        · apply ih; simp [hl]
                        · apply ih hl
                    exact List.ne_nil_of_mem (h_mem [head] (by simp))

rw [← h_is]
                      exact afunc_monotone [head] tail (by simp)
rw [← h_is, ← afuncDef]; apply afunc_monotone; simp
(by rw [← h_is]; exact afunc_monotone _ _ (by simp))

(by intro l hl; induction tail generalizing l with | nil => exact hl | cons x xs ih => simp [List.foldl_cons]; by_cases h_c : index₁ = x.2; · simp [h_c]; apply ih; simp | simp [h_c]; apply ih hl) [head] (by simp)
simp
[head] tail (List.cons_ne_nil head [])
successful_attempts:
simp [← h_is, ← afuncDef]
                    apply afunc_monotone
                    simp
simp [afuncDef, h_is] at *; apply afunc_monotone; simp
